steps: Backfill existing path-only rows into source_id=file-provider.
Create idx_scan_progress_path for path-based compatibility queries.
plan.rollback: Keep scan_progress_path_only_backup until post-migration preflight, Settings diagnostics, and source-scoped read/write verification pass; rollback can rename the backup back to scan_progress or force provider-scoped full rescan.
verification: Verify scan_progress has PRIMARY KEY(source_id, path).
Verify source-scoped read/delete/upsert only touches the intended sourceId.
Verify Settings diagnostics does not report cross-source progress contamination.
